ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the scenario */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scenario (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_scenarios_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial projection */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial scenario the projection belongs to */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the projection (e.g., less than one year, between one and two years) */,
  "value" REAL /* Projected value for the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the projection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the projection was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the projection */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the projection */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial model associated with the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_projections_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES financial_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_projections_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES financial_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_projections_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_projections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., less than one year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time period was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the time period */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_periods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_periods_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial model */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial scenario the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_models_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES financial_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensitivity_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensitivity analysis */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial model the analysis belongs to */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Variable being analyzed (e.g., interest rate, inflation rate) */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the financial model to the variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sensitivity analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sensitivity analysis was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sensitivity analysis */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sensitivity analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensitivity_analysis_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES financial_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensitivity_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensitivity_analysis_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, business stakeholder, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial scenario being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES financial_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial scenario the data belongs to */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the data (e.g., less than one year) */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value for the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES financial_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial trend */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial scenario the trend belongs to */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the trend (e.g., less than one year) */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Description of the financial trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was identified */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who identified the trend */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES financial_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial scenario the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES financial_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
